description: Bridge to Zen Browser's internal workspace APIs and palette UI

functions.name: getAll
functions.description: Get all workspaces

functions.name: getActiveWorkspaceId
functions.description: Get the UUID of the currently active workspace

functions.name: getTabWorkspaceId
functions.description: Get the workspace UUID for a given extension tab ID

functions.name: switchTo
functions.description: Switch to a workspace by UUID

functions.name: activateTabByDomId
functions.description: Activate a tab by its DOM id, switching workspaces if needed

functions.name: goToPreviousTab
functions.description: Go to the previously activated tab (cross-workspace)

functions.name: goToParentTab
functions.description: Go to the opener tab, switching workspaces if needed

functions.name: goToNextSibling
functions.description: Activate the next sibling tab (next tab sharing the same opener)

functions.name: goToPrevSibling
functions.description: Activate the previous sibling tab (previous tab sharing the same opener)

functions.name: goToNextVerticalTab
functions.description: Activate the tab immediately below the current one in the vertical bar (same workspace)

functions.name: goToPrevVerticalTab
functions.description: Activate the tab immediately above the current one in the vertical bar (same workspace)

functions.name: getDefaultCloseTargetDomId
functions.description: Return the DOM id of the tab the browser would focus if the active tab were closed right now (default Cmd+W successor)

functions.name: goToNextWorkspace
functions.description: Switch to the next workspace (with wraparound)

functions.name: goToPrevWorkspace
functions.description: Switch to the previous workspace (with wraparound)

functions.name: togglePinTab
functions.description: Toggle pinned state of the active tab. Refuses to act on Essentials.

functions.name: copyCurrentUrlMarkdown
functions.description: Copy the active tab's URL to the clipboard as a Markdown link [title](url)

functions.name: restoreLastClosedTab
functions.description: Restore the most recently closed tab in this window via SessionStore

functions.name: splitNew
functions.description: Open a new empty split next to the current tab

functions.name: splitClose
functions.description: Close the current split view (no-op if no split active)

functions.name: splitHorizontal
functions.description: Toggle/set split orientation to horizontal divider (top/bottom panes)

functions.name: splitVertical
functions.description: Toggle/set split orientation to vertical divider (side-by-side panes)

functions.name: goBackInTab
functions.description: Navigate the active tab one step back in its session history

functions.name: goForwardInTab
functions.description: Navigate the active tab one step forward in its session history

functions.name: closeTabByDomId
functions.description: Close a tab by its DOM id. Refuses to close pinned tabs.

functions.name: getAllTabs
functions.description: Get all tabs across all workspaces via DOM query

functions.name: getCompanionMods
functions.description: Get all companion mods with install status

functions.name: installCompanionMod
functions.description: Install a companion Zen Mod by ID

functions.name: removeCompanionMod
functions.description: Remove a companion Zen Mod by ID

functions.name: getSelectedTabDomIds
functions.description: Get DOM IDs of multiselected tabs (excludes essentials)

functions.name: getSelectedTabUrls
functions.description: Get URLs of multiselected tabs (excludes essentials)

functions.name: scrollCurrentTabIntoView
functions.description: Scroll the current tab into view in the native tab sidebar

functions.name: getEssentialTabIds
functions.description: Get extension tab IDs of all Zen Essential tabs

functions.name: getNavigationHistory
functions.description: Get the back/forward navigation history of the current tab

functions.name: navigateToHistoryIndex
functions.description: Navigate the current tab to a specific history index

functions.name: syncDuplicates
functions.description: Update zen-tabs-panel-duplicate attribute on all tabs based on URL matching

functions.name: initTabTracking
functions.description: Initialize chrome-side tab tracking listeners (called once at extension startup)

functions.name: markTabVisitedByExtId
functions.description: Clear the persisted unread flag for a tab (called when the tab is activated)

functions.name: pauseFocusTracking
functions.description: Pause focus-duration accumulation (called when the browser window loses focus)

functions.name: resumeFocusTracking
functions.description: Resume focus-duration accumulation (called when the browser window regains focus)

functions.name: getTabUuid
functions.description: Return the stable per-tab UUID, assigning one if missing

functions.name: getTabInfo
functions.description: Get detailed info about a tab including session history and memory usage

functions.name: previewTab
functions.description: Highlight a tab in the sidebar and scroll it into view without activating it

functions.name: clearPreview
functions.description: Clear the preview highlight and restore sidebar scroll position

functions.name: getWorkspacesWithIcons
functions.description: Get all workspaces with inline SVG icon content

functions.name: moveSelectedTabsToWorkspace
functions.description: Move selected tabs to a workspace, placed at top position

functions.name: showPalette
functions.description: Toggle the command palette overlay. Without args, arms the chord engine for 250ms then opens the main menu on timeout. Pass a view name string or {view, skipChord} object to open immediately. Returns a discriminated object: {kind:'opened'|'closed'|'chord-action'|'chord-cancelled', actionId?: string}.

functions.name: hidePalette
functions.description: Close the command palette overlay

functions.name: focusPalette
functions.description: Refocus the popup browser inside the overlay (used after actions that activate a different tab and steal keyboard focus).

functions.name: navigateToView
functions.description: Navigate the palette to a different view with morph animation

functions.name: resizePanel
functions.description: Resize the panel/browser to a given view's natural size. Used by the popup after its in-place cross-fade so panel resize happens after content settles.

functions.name: navigateBack
functions.description: Navigate back in the palette view stack, or close if at root

functions.name: reloadTab
functions.description: Reload the active tab

functions.name: reloadTabSkipCache
functions.description: Reload the active tab bypassing the cache (hard reload)

functions.name: duplicateTab
functions.description: Duplicate the active tab

functions.name: toggleReaderMode
functions.description: Toggle reader mode on the active tab

functions.name: viewPageSource
functions.description: Open the View Source viewer for the active tab

functions.name: viewPageInfo
functions.description: Open the Page Info dialog for the active tab

functions.name: toggleMute
functions.description: Toggle mute state of the active tab's audio

functions.name: resetPinnedTab
functions.description: Reset the active pinned tab to its original pinned URL

functions.name: addToEssentials
functions.description: Add the active tab to Zen Essentials

functions.name: takeScreenshot
functions.description: Open the Firefox screenshot tool on the active page

functions.name: togglePictureInPicture
functions.description: Toggle picture-in-picture for the focused video

functions.name: toggleFullScreen
functions.description: Enter or exit browser full-screen mode

functions.name: toggleDevTools
functions.description: Open or focus the page DevTools

functions.name: toggleBrowserToolbox
functions.description: Open the chrome-process Browser Toolbox

functions.name: openDownloads
functions.description: Open the Downloads view

functions.name: openAddons
functions.description: Open the Add-ons Manager

functions.name: openFirefoxView
functions.description: Open the Firefox View page

functions.name: copyCurrentUrl
functions.description: Copy the current tab's URL to the clipboard

functions.name: activateUnvisitedNewest
functions.description: Activate the most recently accessed unread tab

functions.name: activateUnvisitedOldest
functions.description: Activate the least recently accessed unread tab

functions.name: getFolders
functions.description: List all Zen tab-group folders

functions.name: moveTabToFolder
functions.description: Move the active tab into the specified folder (tab group)

functions.name: reopenInContainer
functions.description: Reopen the active tab in a different contextual identity (container)

functions.name: getProfiles
functions.description: Enumerate Firefox/Zen profiles from the toolkit profile service

functions.name: launchProfile
functions.description: Launch a new Zen instance against the named profile

functions.name: listBrowserActionExtensions
functions.description: Enumerate installed WebExtensions that declare a browser_action popup, returning their id, name, popup URL, and base64 data-URL icon.

functions.name: openExtensionPopup
functions.description: Open another extension's popup inside our palette overlay. extensionId is the WebExtension id (matches the result from listBrowserActionExtensions).

functions.name: setExtensionPopupIntercept
functions.description: Toggle the Services.ww.openWindow monkey-patch that catches extension-spawned popup windows and routes them into our overlay. Backed by the interceptExtensionPopups setting.

events.name: onPaletteRequest
events.description: Fires when the user invokes the palette via a chrome-side gesture (e.g. double-tap Cmd). Background listens and runs the same flow as browser.commands.onCommand for open-palette.
